note: Records the git SHA at which each app's baseline was frozen. The cohort must run AFTER the freeze — if a baseline run exists with a null frozen_at_commit, it is invalid.
governance: Changing a frozen_at_commit after the baseline run is an OWNER_GATE. The freeze establishes the code-state boundary between 'building the app' and 'running the experiment'.

video-storefront.note: Not yet frozen — will be set at kpi-setup stage before baseline cohort run
